notes_for_human_reviewer: Structured; owners on every item; R1/R2 fully complete. Triggers inconsistent (R3/R4 missing). Some mitigations specific (R1, R2), others vague (R4 'Investigate'). Categories correctly applied. Single snapshot — floor on living-artifact. intermediate_01 is an inherently borderline fixture — Claude shows 2-point range on multiple dims run-to-run. Three cells have tolerance 2: living_artifact_evidence, ownership_and_accountability, and risk_differentiation (each failed in separate runs by scoring 2 vs expected 4). The aggregate ≥80% ±1 check is the real regression gate for borderline fixtures; per-cell tolerance ≤1 is reserved for floor/ceiling fixtures with clear signal.
